# Selectors, paths, labels, and tags

Utilities for locating, describing, labeling, and filtering PyTree leaves.

<a id="equimo-finetune-canonical-tags"></a>
## `CANONICAL_TAGS`

```python
equimo.finetune.CANONICAL_TAGS = ('embedding', 'embedding.patch', 'embedding.position', 'embedding.class_token', 'embedding.register_token', 'embedding.distillation_token', 'embedding.mask_token', 'embedding.token', 'block', 'block.attention', 'block.attention.qkv', 'block.attention.q', 'block.attention.k', 'block.attention.v', 'block.attention.proj', 'attention', 'attention.qkv', 'attention.q', 'attention.k', 'attention.v', 'attention.proj', 'block.mlp', 'block.mlp.hidden', 'block.mlp.fc1', 'block.mlp.fc2', 'block.norm.pre', 'block.norm.post', 'block.drop_path', 'block.layer_scale', 'mlp', 'mlp.hidden', 'mlp.fc1', 'mlp.fc2', 'stem', 'stage', 'stage.block', 'stage.downsample', 'conv', 'conv.depthwise', 'conv.pointwise', 'norm', 'pool', 'head', 'head.classifier', 'head.projection', 'audio.frontend', 'audio.spectrogram', 'audio.patch_embed', 'audio.frame_encoder', 'audio.transformer.block', 'audio.pooling', 'audio.ctc_head', 'audio.tagging_head', 'text.embedding', 'text.position', 'text.token_type', 'text.block', 'text.attention.qkv', 'text.attention.q', 'text.attention.k', 'text.attention.v', 'text.attention.proj', 'text.mlp.fc1', 'text.mlp.fc2', 'text.pooler', 'text.projection_head', 'tabular.encoder', 'tabular.tokenizer', 'tabular.block', 'tabular.head')
```

<!-- equimo.finetune:canonical_tags_for_path -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-canonical-tags-for-path"></a>
## `canonical_tags_for_path`

```python
equimo.finetune.canonical_tags_for_path(path: 'Path', leaf: 'Any | None' = None) -> 'frozenset[str]'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.tags`.

> Infer canonical semantic tags from an Equimo-style parameter path.

<!-- equimo.finetune:extract_param_paths -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-extract-param-paths"></a>
## `extract_param_paths`

```python
equimo.finetune.extract_param_paths(tree: 'PyTree', *, predicate: 'LeafFilter' = <function is_inexact_array>) -> 'tuple[str, ...]'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.paths`.

> Return dot-formatted paths for parameter-like leaves.

<!-- equimo.finetune:infer_depth -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-infer-depth"></a>
## `infer_depth`

```python
equimo.finetune.infer_depth(path: 'Path') -> 'int | None'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.tags`.

> Infer semantic block depth from common Equimo path shapes.

<!-- equimo.finetune:is_layer_norm -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-is-layer-norm"></a>
## `is_layer_norm`

```python
equimo.finetune.is_layer_norm(path: 'Path', node: 'Any') -> 'bool'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.selectors`.

> Return whether ``node`` is an Equinox LayerNorm module.

<!-- equimo.finetune:is_linear -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-is-linear"></a>
## `is_linear`

```python
equimo.finetune.is_linear(path: 'Path', node: 'Any') -> 'bool'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.selectors`.

> Return whether ``node`` is an Equinox linear module.

<!-- equimo.finetune:iter_param_infos -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-iter-param-infos"></a>
## `iter_param_infos`

```python
equimo.finetune.iter_param_infos(tree: 'PyTree', *, tagger: 'Tagger' = <function canonical_tags_for_path>) -> 'tuple[ParamInfo, ...]'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.tags`.

> Return tagged ``ParamInfo`` records for inexact array leaves.

<!-- equimo.finetune:iter_param_leaves -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-iter-param-leaves"></a>
## `iter_param_leaves`

```python
equimo.finetune.iter_param_leaves(tree: 'PyTree', *, predicate: 'LeafFilter' = <function is_inexact_array>) -> 'tuple[tuple[Path, Any], ...]'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.paths`.

> Return stable paths and values for parameter-like leaves.

## `iter_param_paths`

```python
equimo.finetune.iter_param_paths(tree: 'PyTree', *, predicate: 'LeafFilter' = <function is_inexact_array>) -> 'tuple[Path, ...]'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.paths`.

> Return stable paths for parameter-like leaves.

## `make_param_info_tree`

```python
equimo.finetune.make_param_info_tree(tree: 'PyTree', *, predicate: 'LeafFilter' = <function is_inexact_array>) -> 'PyTree'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.paths`.

> Replace parameter-like leaves with base ``ParamInfo`` records.

<!-- equimo.finetune:make_param_labels -->

## `make_param_labels`

```python
equimo.finetune.make_param_labels(model: 'PyTree', llrd_config: 'LLRDConfig | None' = None, *, trainable_paths: 'frozenset[Path] | None' = None, tagger: 'Tagger' = <function canonical_tags_for_path>) -> 'PyTree'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.labels`.

> Return a PyTree of optimizer-group labels for parameter leaves.

<!-- equimo.finetune:make_path_tree -->

## `make_path_tree`

```python
equimo.finetune.make_path_tree(tree: 'PyTree', *, predicate: 'LeafFilter' = <function is_inexact_array>) -> 'PyTree'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.paths`.

> Replace parameter-like leaves with their stable paths.

## `make_trainable_filter`

```python
equimo.finetune.make_trainable_filter(model: 'PyTree', spec: 'TrainableSpec', *, tagger: 'Tagger' = <function canonical_tags_for_path>) -> 'PyTree'
```

<!-- equimo.finetune:path_to_str -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-path-to-str"></a>
## `path_to_str`

```python
equimo.finetune.path_to_str(path: 'Path') -> 'str'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.paths`.

> Format a path as an unambiguous dot-separated string.
>
> Ordinary identifier-like paths keep their historical representation. Dots and
> backslashes inside string components are escaped, while integer-looking string
> components use a ``\s`` prefix so they cannot be confused with sequence indices.

<!-- equimo.finetune:resolve_target -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-resolve-target"></a>
## `resolve_target`

```python
equimo.finetune.resolve_target(model: 'PyTree', target: 'TargetSpec', *, allow_empty: 'bool' = False, tagger: 'Tagger' = <function canonical_tags_for_path>) -> 'tuple[ParamInfo, ...]'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.selectors`.

> Resolve a ``TargetSpec`` to tagged parameter leaf metadata.

<!-- equimo.finetune:resolve_target_paths -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-resolve-target-paths"></a>
## `resolve_target_paths`

```python
equimo.finetune.resolve_target_paths(model: 'PyTree', target: 'TargetSpec', *, allow_empty: 'bool' = False, tagger: 'Tagger' = <function canonical_tags_for_path>) -> 'tuple[str, ...]'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.selectors`.

> Resolve a ``TargetSpec`` to stable dot-formatted parameter paths.

<!-- equimo.finetune:str_to_path -->
<a id="equimo-finetune-str-to-path"></a>
## `str_to_path`

```python
equimo.finetune.str_to_path(path: 'str') -> 'Path'
```

Defined in `equimo.finetune.paths`.

> Parse a path produced by :func:`path_to_str`.
>
> Legacy unescaped paths remain supported.
